data.body:
[Rerun Pick-Up Recruitment Preview]

A Rerun Pick-Up Recruitment will begin on 3/31 (Tue)!

💌Pick-Up Student: 3★ Reisa, 3★ Mine
🗓️Pick-Up Recruitment Schedule: 3/31 (Tue) 2:00 AM – 4/7 (Tue) 1:59 AM (UTC)
